RULING:
PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING LEAVE TO FILE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' motion for order granting leave to file second amended complaint is granted. Plaintiffs may plead product liability allegations against the defendants identified in their Notice of Motion and may re-name the two other defendants identified in their Notice of Motion. The Second Amended Complaint is deemed served as of the date of granting this motion on all defendants who have previously appeared. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court.
